greetings: 👋 Oh no… I’ve been summoned again.
🎉 Someone added me. This chat has officially changed difficulty.
🤖 Hello humans. I am here. No refunds.
😎 I joined. Productivity left the server.
⚡ I wasn’t invited… but I came anyway.
🧃 I run on bugs and bad decisions. Hi.
🛠️ System notice: sanity levels may decrease.
🚪 I entered the chat like I own the place (I don’t).
💀 Someone pressed add. Now we suffer together.
quotes: Debugging: when you fix one bug and unlock three more.
Code works… until you show someone.
Errors: nature’s way of saying ‘try again idiot’ (politely).
I don’t make mistakes. I create unexpected features.
Programming is just controlled chaos with deadlines.
If it works, don’t touch it. Ever.
Stack traces are just sad poems written by machines.
Real developers don’t panic… they Google faster.
